name: globe.gl

en.when_to_use: Use it when a rotating-globe narrative should show global distribution or connections (routes, networks, migration, launch events). For flat distribution use deck.gl/d3-geo; if you do not need 3D, do not put it on a globe. It wraps spherical projection, a ThreeJS camera, and latitude/longitude-to-Cartesian conversion in one chained config.
en.why_valuable: A 3D globe with latitude/longitude data (points, arcs, heatmaps, country polygons) involves spherical projection, a ThreeJS camera, latitude/longitude-to-Cartesian conversion, GPU rendering, and interaction picking; native AI will almost certainly fail when writing it by hand. A chained globe.gl config produces a rotatable, interactive data globe and bundles three itself.

data_in.note: Kapsule chaining API: after new Globe(el), chain .pointsData(arr).arcsData(arr) and similar configuration. Accessors (pointLat/pointLng, etc.) default to object lat/lng properties but can be changed. globeImageUrl textures must be CORS-reachable. canvas renders into the supplied el (which may be in shadow), but the library uses styleInject on document.head.

schema.globeImageUrl: string -- globe texture URL (for example //unpkg.com/three-globe/example/img/earth-dark.jpg; must be CORS-reachable)
schema.points?: [{ lat:number, lng:number, color?:string, altitude?:number, size?:number }] -- pointsData; pointLat/pointLng default to lat/lng
schema.arcs?: [{ startLat:number, startLng:number, endLat:number, endLng:number, color?:string|string[] }] -- arcsData (routes/connections)

spec.note: globe.gl reads the supplied container size to render a WebGL canvas; the container must have an explicit px height. Do not use vh or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 想用「旋转地球」叙事展示全球分布/连线(航线、网络、迁徙、发射事件)时用它;若只需平面分布用 deck.gl/d3-geo,不需要 3D 就别上球。它把球面投影+ThreeJS 相机+经纬度转笛卡尔封成一个链式 config。
why_valuable: 3D 地球+经纬度数据(点/弧/热力/国家多边形)涉及球面投影、ThreeJS 相机、经纬度转笛卡尔、GPU 渲染与交互拾取,原生 AI 徒手写几乎必翻车。globe.gl 一串链式 config 即出可旋转、可交互的数据地球(自 bundle three)。

data_in.note: kapsule 链式 API:new Globe(el) 后 .pointsData(arr).arcsData(arr) 等链式配置。accessor(pointLat/pointLng 等)默认取对象的 lat/lng 属性但可改。globeImageUrl 贴图须 CORS 可达。canvas 渲染进传入的 el(可落 shadow),但库会 styleInject 到 document.head。

schema.globeImageUrl: string —— 地球贴图 URL(如 //unpkg.com/three-globe/example/img/earth-dark.jpg;须 CORS 可达)
schema.points?: [{ lat:number, lng:number, color?:string, altitude?:number, size?:number }] —— pointsData;pointLat/pointLng 默认取 lat/lng
schema.arcs?: [{ startLat:number, startLng:number, endLat:number, endLng:number, color?:string|string[] }] —— arcsData(航线/连线)
schema.showAtmosphere?: boolean —— 大气层光晕,默认 true
schema.showGraticules?: boolean —— 经纬网格,默认 false

spec.note: globe.gl 读传入容器尺寸渲染 WebGL canvas;容器须显式 px 高,禁用 vh/百分比高。

example._why: globe.gl 的 point/arc accessor 默认取 lat/lng/startLat...;minimal 钉死这套默认字段名。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;点/弧点击或视点变化若需外传,由消费 AI 直接接 onPointClick/onArcClick/onGlobeClick 原生回调并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: supported:canvas 与 tooltip 渲染进传入的 el(可落 shadow);但 globe.gl 经 styleInject 向 document.head 注入 .clickable/tooltip 小样式(铁律2 例外,已实测,类名限本库)
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + WebGL(自 bundle three);无 worker/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm 导出 {default}(export{Globe as default});dist/globe.gl.d.ts:declare const Globe:{ new(element:HTMLElement, configOptions?):GlobeInstance }——故 new Globe(el) 正确。accessor 继承 three-globe(实测 three-globe@2.45.2 d.ts 有 globeImageUrl/pointsData/pointLat/pointLng/pointColor/pointAltitude/arcsData/arcStartLat/arcStartLng/arcEndLat/arcEndLng/showAtmosphere/showGraticules)。globalStyleInjection=yes:globe.mjs grep createElement('style')×1 + document.head×1 + styleInject×2,注入 CSS 含 '.clickable{cursor:pointer}' 与 float-tooltip 样式(限本库类名,非破坏性但确写 head)。globalDomMutation=yes(仅指 styleInject 到 head;canvas 与 tooltip 挂进传入 el 的 domNode,非 body——grep domNode×3、renderer.domElement 挂容器)。globalEvents=yes:three OrbitControls 挂 renderer.domElement + resize 处理,_destructor() 清理。shadowCompatible=conditional:canvas/tooltip 可全落 shadow,唯 styleInject 逃逸到 head(小且限本库)。
